episodes.title: #193 - Ohio Cults - Church Of God Reformation In Greenville
episodes.description: In this episode Dan Anderson tells us all about the Cult church located in Greenville, Ohio called Church Of God Restoration. This Cult has every red flag when it comes to cult operations, fear mongering its' members so they never leave, sexual abuse, even choosing what underwear color women should wear! This is a crazy exposure of a Cult that has gone unchecked since the 1980s and i anticipate this being a Netflix documentary at one point.
